---
title: "DHARMa Residual Diagnostics for Model 5 (NB2)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(glmmTMB)
library(DHARMa)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(this.path)

setwd(this.path::here())

EDV.INPUT.FILE <- "../data/edv/regional_edv_data.csv"
FORMULA.NUM <- 5
FAMILY.NAME <- "nbinom2"
FAMILY <- nbinom2()

formulas <- c(
    "ed.visits ~ sine + cosine + (1|region)",
    "ed.visits ~ sine + cosine + (sine+cosine+1|region)",
    "ed.visits ~ sine + cosine + X + (1|region)",
    "ed.visits ~ sine + cosine + X + (X+1|region)",
    "ed.visits ~ sine + cosine + X + (sine+cosine+1|region)",
    "ed.visits ~ sine + cosine + X + (X+sine+cosine+1|region)"
)

FORMULA <- as.formula(formulas[FORMULA.NUM])

covariate.settings <- list(
    list(
        covariate = "temp",
        start_date = as.Date("2018-01-01"),
        end_date = as.Date("2025-12-31")
    ),
    list(
        covariate = "heat_index",
        start_date = as.Date("2018-01-01"),
        end_date = as.Date("2022-12-31")
    )
)

OUTPUT.BASE <- "../plots/dharma_residuals"
if (!dir.exists(OUTPUT.BASE)) dir.create(OUTPUT.BASE, recursive = TRUE)
```

## Generate and save DHARMa plots

```{r diagnostics, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
run_dharma_plots <- function(setting) {
    COVARIATE <- setting$covariate
    START.DATE <- setting$start_date
    END.DATE <- setting$end_date

    X.INPUT.FILE <- paste0("../data/", COVARIATE, "/regional_", COVARIATE, "_data.csv")
    OUTPUT.FOLDER <- file.path(
        OUTPUT.BASE,
        paste(COVARIATE, START.DATE, END.DATE, FAMILY.NAME, paste0("model", FORMULA.NUM), sep = "_")
    )
    if (!dir.exists(OUTPUT.FOLDER)) dir.create(OUTPUT.FOLDER, recursive = TRUE)

    edv <- read.csv(EDV.INPUT.FILE, row.names = 1)
    edv <- edv[(START.DATE <= as.Date(rownames(edv))) & (as.Date(rownames(edv)) <= END.DATE), ]
    edv$t <- 1:nrow(edv)

    X <- read.csv(X.INPUT.FILE, row.names = 1)
    X <- X[(START.DATE <= as.Date(rownames(X))) & (as.Date(rownames(X)) <= END.DATE), ]

    X <- pivot_longer(X, cols = colnames(X), names_to = "region", values_to = COVARIATE)
    edv <- pivot_longer(edv, cols = colnames(edv)[1:10], names_to = "region", values_to = "ed.visits")

    edv$X <- X[[COVARIATE]]
    phi <- 2 * pi / 365.25
    edv$sine <- sin(phi * edv$t)
    edv$cosine <- cos(phi * edv$t)
    edv$region <- factor(edv$region)

    model <- glmmTMB(FORMULA, data = edv, family = FAMILY)
    sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)

    # This is the standard DHARMa multi-panel plot, including QQ/uniformity style diagnostics
    png(
        filename = file.path(OUTPUT.FOLDER, paste0(COVARIATE, "_model", FORMULA.NUM, "_", FAMILY.NAME, "_dharma_default_plot.png")),
        width = 1600, height = 1200, res = 180
    )
    plot(sim_res)
    dev.off()

    # Optional extra base-R style diagnostic plots from DHARMa
    png(
        filename = file.path(OUTPUT.FOLDER, paste0(COVARIATE, "_model", FORMULA.NUM, "_", FAMILY.NAME, "_residual_vs_predictor.png")),
        width = 1600, height = 1200, res = 180
    )
    plotResiduals(sim_res, form = edv$X)
    dev.off()

    png(
        filename = file.path(OUTPUT.FOLDER, paste0(COVARIATE, "_model", FORMULA.NUM, "_", FAMILY.NAME, "_residual_vs_time.png")),
        width = 1600, height = 1200, res = 180
    )
    plotResiduals(sim_res, form = edv$t)
    dev.off()

    save(model, sim_res,
        file = file.path(OUTPUT.FOLDER, paste0(COVARIATE, "_model", FORMULA.NUM, "_", FAMILY.NAME, "_diagnostics.RData"))
    )

    cat("Saved DHARMa plots for", COVARIATE, "to", OUTPUT.FOLDER, "\n")
}

invisible(lapply(covariate.settings, run_dharma_plots))
```

## Notes

```{r notes, echo=FALSE}
cat("This file fits Model 5 with nbinom2 for both temperature and heat index.\n")
cat("It saves the default DHARMa plot produced by plot(sim_res).\n")
cat("Temperature uses data through 2025-12-31, while heat index uses data through 2022-12-31.\n")
cat("Outputs are saved under ../plots/dharma_residuals/.\n")
```

```{r}
env <- new.env()
load("../plots/dharma_residuals/heat_index_2018-01-01_2022-12-31_nbinom2_model5/heat_index_model5_nbinom2_diagnostics.RData", envir = env)
ls(env)
env$sim_res
testUniformity(env$sim_res)
testDispersion(env$sim_res)
testZeroInflation(env$sim_res)
```

```{r}
env <- new.env()
load("../plots/dharma_residuals/temp_2018-01-01_2025-12-31_nbinom2_model5/temp_model5_nbinom2_diagnostics.RData", envir = env)
ls(env)
env$sim_res
testUniformity(env$sim_res)
testDispersion(env$sim_res)
testZeroInflation(env$sim_res)
```
